texto: Who is truly wealthy? That man to whom the agreeable and disagreeable, wealth and woe, past and future, are the same. What is the most wondrous thing on earth? Each day countless humans enter the Temple of Death, yet the ones left behind continue to live as though they were immortal.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Chitra Lekha Banerjee Divakaruni que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Who is truly wealthy? That man to whom the agreeable and disagreeable, wealth and woe, past and f…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, sabedoria, truly, com foco em luto e reflexao.
